violations.text: Sauces were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. A dishwasher thermometer was ordered online during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
Ceiling tiles are missing above the mop sink area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024

The door to the outside, located in the bar, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024

The grease recycling receptacle outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024

The floor and wall junctures along the wall with the mop sink and hand sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
The kitchen does not have a proper ceiling in food prep areas. A ceiling must be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
